selection_notes: Re-selected 2026-06-19 following price-zone audit. Original selection (Strengen, 16.142.0, Telemark) was in NO1 price area and represented only a 72 km² unregulated sub-catchment with zero reservoirs — incompatible with the reservoir scheduling model. Rygene total (19.127.0) on the Arendalsvassdraget in Agder is in NO2, has a 3946 km² regulated catchment with 33 reservoirs (including Brokke kraftverk), mean discharge 418 m³/s, and 100% completeness over 2000-2025. See station_scores.csv and no2_station_scores_agder_rogaland.csv for full scoring.
